ogTitle: O'Halloran Hill vs O'Sullivan Beach: Climate Safety

heading: O'Halloran Hill vs O'Sullivan Beach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between O'Halloran Hill, South Australia and O'Sullivan Beach, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: O'Sullivan Beach has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to O'Halloran Hill (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is O'Halloran Hill or O'Sullivan Beach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: O'Halloran Hill has a flood risk score of 35/100, while O'Sullivan Beach scores 30/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: O'Halloran Hill scores 54/100 for bushfire risk. O'Sullivan Beach scores 26/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in O'Halloran Hill or O'Sullivan Beach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. O'Sullivan Beach has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
